summary: Recent CS graduate with 1.5 years full-stack experience. Comfortable with Python and React from academic projects and an internship. Eager to learn and grow. No production-scale experience or cloud certifications yet.

positions.title: Junior Full-Stack Developer
positions.description: Building features for an early-stage e-commerce platform. Python/Flask backend with React frontend. Fixing bugs, writing unit tests, and maintaining the PostgreSQL database. Team of 3 engineers. No Kubernetes or cloud deployment experience yet.

positions.title: Software Engineering Intern
positions.description: 3-month internship building a Python script to automate reporting. Also helped with a React component for internal tooling.

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.title: Study Buddy App
